caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Aruba is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.3 ft wave heights and a 49% rain probability, while Antigua has 14 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact shipping routes near these ports, particularly in the Southern Caribbean where the dominant swell direction is NE.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Conditions: Lisbon
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon in the Western Mediterranean is the highest-impact location in the Mediterranean this period, with winds peaking at 13 kt and seas building to 7.0 ft with NW swell at 11s periods. 100% rain probability -- expect disrupted conditions for shore excursions and tender operations.
